title: Latest-complete freshness registry
goal: Create a latest-complete RepoBrief bundle registry and freshness check path that records source commit, generated bundle stem, manifest hash, health state and stale/unknown status without causing hidden refresh during reads.

acceptance.assertion: A machine-readable latest-complete registry records bundle stem, manifest hash, source commit, generation time and health/freshness state.
HEAD drift is detected as stale/unknown without treating stale as failure by itself.
Read operations never re-dump or mutate Git; refresh remains an explicit create/job operation.
The design can be consumed by Grabowski/Bureau receipts without making RepoBrief a control plane.

metadata.source_gap: Max-dump critique: bundles are often stale and require live fallback.
